identity.mission: Create a 'Warm Productivity' aesthetic that defies the clinical 'SaaS Blue' standard. Use 'Sunlit Turf' energy (Orange/Cream) to make management feel active and physical.
principles: Fusion: Mix 'Sports Locker Room' durability with 'Swiss Hotel' minimalism.
Emotion: Reliability meets Energy. The app should feel like a fresh morning on the field.
Content: Data is the hero. Numbers must be big, legible, and confident.
Negative Space: Use 'Cream' space to let the 'Orange' action buttons breathe.
Contrast: High contrast text (Charcoal) on soft backgrounds (Cream).

heading.usage: Page titles, big stats, card headers. Sporty and vertical.

body.usage: Standard text, form labels, list items. Clean and legible.

primary.description: Tailwind Orange-500. Use for Main Actions (Add Booking, Save), Active States, and Brand Highlights.

secondary.description: Stone-100. Use for secondary buttons, tags, and inactive states.

accent.description: Orange-50. Use for active nav items, selected calendar days (background).

background.description: Warm Cream / Off-White. Avoid pure #FFFFFF for the main background. Use #FFFFFF for Cards.

rules: NO Blue/Green branding. Use Orange for brand identity.
Background must be warm (Cream/Stone), not sterile blue-white.
Gradients: Use subtle 'Orange-to-Yellow' fade ONLY on the primary action button. Keep everything else flat.
Text Contrast: Always use #1A1A1A for main text, never pure black.

dashboard.pattern: Bento Grid: Hero Stat (span-2), Quick List (span-2), Actions (span-1).

buttons.primary: bg-orange-500 hover:bg-orange-600 text-white font-bold rounded-xl h-12 px-6 shadow-md shadow-orange-500/20 active:scale-95 transition-transform
buttons.secondary: bg-stone-100 hover:bg-stone-200 text-stone-800 font-semibold rounded-xl h-12 px-6
buttons.ghost: bg-transparent hover:bg-orange-50 text-orange-600 font-medium rounded-lg h-10 px-4
buttons.fab: fixed bottom-6 right-6 h-14 w-14 rounded-full bg-orange-500 text-white shadow-lg shadow-orange-500/30 flex items-center justify-center z-50 md:hidden

inputs.default: h-12 bg-stone-50 border-stone-200 focus:border-orange-500 focus:ring-2 focus:ring-orange-500/20 rounded-xl text-lg
inputs.label: text-sm font-semibold text-stone-700 uppercase tracking-wide mb-1.5

calendar.wrapper: bg-white rounded-2xl p-4 shadow-sm border border-stone-100

navigation.mobile_bottom_bar: fixed bottom-0 left-0 right-0 h-16 bg-white border-t border-stone-200 flex justify-around items-center z-40
navigation.desktop_top_bar: h-16 bg-white/80 backdrop-blur border-b border-stone-200 flex items-center px-8 justify-between

login_bg.desc: Aerial Soccer Field. Use with 'bg-orange-900/80' overlay for contrast.

texture_overlay.desc: White line on turf. Use as subtle texture in sidebar or cards (opacity 5%).

dashboard_hero.desc: Turf Detail. Use for 'Premium' card backgrounds.

rules: Orange text on White must be bold/large enough (Ratio 3:1+).

setup: Install 'Barlow Condensed' via Google Fonts import in index.css.
Create a 'Layout' component that handles the Mobile Bottom Bar / Desktop Top Bar logic.
implementation_tips: For the Calendar: Use the 'react-day-picker' (Shadcn default) but override the styles to match the Orange theme.
For the Add Booking Form: Use a 'Drawer' (Sheet) on mobile and a 'Dialog' (Modal) on desktop.
For Charts: Use 'Recharts' with custom colors (Orange for Profit, Black for Income, Red for Expense).
Google Login: Mock it if SDK not available, but UI should show 'Sign in with Google' button (White button, Google Icon, Border).
critical_constraints: DO NOT use Green for buttons or backgrounds.
DO NOT use Blue for links (Use Orange or Dark Grey).
Keep the UI 'Flat' with subtle shadows. No heavy bevels or gradients.

design: Avoid 'AI Slop' (Generic layouts). Use asymmetric grids where possible.
